olap_sql: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='main' ORDER BY table_name
pgq_sql: SELECT * FROM GRAPH_TABLE(financial_graph MATCH (a:accounts)-[t:RELATED_TO]->(b:accounts) COLUMNS (a.id AS source, b.id AS target, t.amount AS amount)) LIMIT 8
